name: Beating up Angel Heaven
description:
"Shut up. I'm sick of you"

The words drip from mouth like a blood from your nose.

[VesselPOV]

ALL CHARACTERS ARE AT LEAST 18+ YEARS OLD!!

So, I wanted to have bot with the plot where Kris just sealed fountain in the Shelter and met Vessel. It supposed to be a hurt/comfort thing. Have fun, maybe even fight back I dunno lol

(I don't remember who drew the art on pfp, yes, again... but I've found it on tumblr)
